title: Stories & Squads Real Reading

acceptance_criteria_testability.rationale: All ACs testable. 'StoryWorkspace displays stories from project (not FALLBACK_STORIES)' verified by checking for FALLBACK_STORIES import. 'Kanban board columns reflect actual story status' verifiable by UI inspection. 'Stories grouped by epic' — count groups visually.

no_invented_features.rationale: Every requirement traces to explicit AC. Backend endpoint design matches pattern in 3.10. File reading from docs/stories/ is existing project structure. No invented features.

pattern_consistency.rationale: Follows Hook → useQuery → Component pattern from 3.10. Adds backend endpoint (new for Wave 5 but consistent across 3.11-3.13). Minor variation from 3.10: includes backend work. Still consistent.

brownfield_context_respected.rationale: Updates existing StoryWorkspace and SquadsView components. Removes FALLBACK_STORIES (hardcoded data). Respects project structure (docs/stories/ directory). No reinvention of squad management.

real_data_emphasis.rationale: Explicitly eliminates all mock story data. Every story comes from actual .story.md files. SquadsView displays real squads. Testing emphasizes real project data.

backend_frontend_scope_clarity.rationale: Backend scope clear: new /api/stories endpoint, file system read, YAML parsing. Frontend scope clear: 3 files updated (hook, component services). No ambiguity. Clean separation.

reasoning: Story 3.11 is well-scoped STANDARD story (13/25 pts). It builds on 3.10 pattern and applies same Hook → useQuery → Component approach but adds backend file I/O. Specification is detailed with clear testing strategy. Depends on 3.10 approval for pattern consistency. No revisions needed. Ready for development after 3.10.
critical_notes: Schedule after 3.10 approval (same pattern, slightly more complex)
YAML parsing adds moderate complexity but is standard operation
Removing FALLBACK_STORIES is critical — must be complete deletion
File paths must be relative from project root
Story status inference from checklist is key complexity — test with real story files
dev_notes: Start with backend service (file reading and YAML parsing)
Test endpoint with curl before connecting frontend
Verify story files are readable from backend (docs/stories/ path)
Test with actual story files from project (3.1-3.15)
Implement status inference by counting [ ] vs [x] in AC section
Use existing Kanban/board component if available
Remove all FALLBACK_STORIES imports and usages
Test filtering on real data (epic=3, status=in-progress, etc.)
potential_blockers: Story file parsing may fail if frontmatter format varies
Status inference may be inaccurate if AC section format changes
Squad data source must be defined (API or file-based?)
